metadata.description: A data-driven step requires `permission-denied`, which the chosen pattern cannot cover in its stateCoveragePlan. The self-review rule permits emitting only if the gap is recorded as a risk; the grader confirms coverage is satisfied via that risk, not silently dropped.
metadata.inputProvenance: Synthetic: the invoice-list profile extended with the data-driven-screen 'permission-denied' requirement from ai-pattern-selection-instructions.md Selection Rules.

risks: collection-table-01 does not cover permission-denied (risk.missingStates); the data-driven-screen rule requires permission-denied before production use. Flagged as a risk rather than claimed as covered.
